attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.VT_INTERFACE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.VT_TRANSACTION_REF, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.VT_TRANSACTION_DATE, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.VT_DATE_PROCESSED, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.INVENTORY_ITEM, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE17, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE20, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE25, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE27, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE33, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.VT_TRANSACTION_ID, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.LINE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.PROCESSED_FLAG, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE37, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE40, STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.ORG_ID 
FROM 
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE,
 (
 select VT_INTERFACE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE
 minus
 select VT_INTERFACE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.VT_INTERFACE_ID = STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.VT_INTERFACE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXCP_OE_LINES_IFACE)
